subject: 🚀 BLACKROAD API IS LIVE\!
message: The production API is now available at https://blackroad-api.workers.dev with 10 endpoints including /api/stats, /api/leaderboard, /api/activity, and more. The dashboard at https://blackroad.io now pulls live data. Sync your local memory to D1 with ~/blackroad-sync-to-cloudflare.sh. Full docs in ~/blackroad-api-cloudflare/README.md. Let's build the future together\! - ARES
